thesis.core_idea: KPIT is a specialized automotive software company with strong growth in autonomous driving and cybersecurity verticals. Trading at a significant discount from peak due to valuation correction, but fundamentals remain solid with 19 consecutive growth quarters.
thesis.growth_driver: Automotive software in powertrain, autonomous driving, digital cockpits, and ADAS; Expanded addressable market in EV and autonomous vehicles; New deal wins in cybersecurity and after-sales diagnostics.
thesis.edge: Domain expertise in automotive software; ROCE above industry average; Recurring revenue model; Diversification across geographies and OEMs.
thesis.trigger: Improving client sentiment post-tariff clarity; Autonomous driving deal acceleration; Margin expansion from digital cockpit and ADAS spending increases.

valuation.margin_of_safety: Current price 28% below fair value midpoint; 39% below historical peak

capital_efficiency.reinvestment_quality: High - focused on autonomous driving and cybersecurity

structural_risks: Intense competition from global automotive software giants
company_risks: Execution risk in new business domains
Talent retention in competitive tech sector
Stock down 49.8% from purchase price creates margin pressure

position_sizing.suggested_allocation: Accumulate on weakness to reach 9% target weight; add 40-50% more at 600-700 zone given margin of safety

next_triggers: Q4 FY25 results and FY26 guidance
Client win rates in cybersecurity and ADAS
key_metrics: Deal win momentum in new verticals
red_flags: Major customer loss or concentration spike
